call_transcript:
Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently inquired about a personal loan on our website. Um, how are you doing today? 
Eleanor: Good, thanks. 
Agent: Great! So, based on your application, we are pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%. This could really help with, you know, consolidating debt or maybe a home improvement project? 
Eleanor: I was thinking more about a car down payment, actually. 
Agent: Perfect! A car is a great use of funds. Now, the monthly payments would be approximately $198 for 60 months. Does that fit within your budget? 
Eleanor: Hmm, yeah, I think so. What are the fees like? 
Agent: There's a one-time origination fee of $200, and that's it. No prepayment penalties. 
Eleanor: Okay. And the interest rate is fixed at 8.99%? 
Agent: Absolutely. Fixed for the life of the loan. We can get the paperwork started right away if you'd like. 
Eleanor: Yeah, let's do it. Sounds good.

Agent: Hello, Mr. Miller? This is Sarah calling from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. 
Robert: Where did you get my number? I didn't give anyone permission to call me. 
Agent: Sir, we acquired your information through… uh… a marketing partner. We're pre-approving you for a $5,000 Signature Credit Card with an interest rate of 19.99%. 
Robert: 19.99?! Are you kidding me? That's outrageous! I already have a credit card. 
Agent: Well, sir, this card offers… 
Robert: No, thank you. Don't call me again. *click*

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Finance Solutions. I'm calling regarding a Personal Loan. I understand you were referred by our partner, GreenTech Solutions? 
Jessica: Yeah, that's right. I'm looking to consolidate some student loans. 
Agent: Excellent. We can definitely help with that. We are pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 7.49%. That's a really competitive rate, especially with your credit score. 
Jessica: That sounds pretty good. What's the term length? 
Agent: We offer terms from 36 to 72 months. What would work best for you? 
Jessica: Probably 60 months. 
Agent: Okay, so $15,000 at 7.49% for 60 months would be approximately $290 a month. There's a $150 origination fee. 
Jessica: Hmm, okay. Can you send me some information about the loan details? 
Agent: Absolutely. I can email you a full loan agreement right now. Would you like me to do that? 
Jessica: Yes, please. 
Agent: Great. And just to confirm, your email is jessica.chen@email.com? 
Jessica: Yes, that's correct. 
Agent: Perfect. You'll receive that within the next few minutes. We look forward to helping you consolidate your debt!

Agent: Hello, Mr. Davis? This is Lisa from Finance Solutions. 
Michael: (Interrupting) Look, you guys called me yesterday! I told you I'm not interested! 
Agent: Sir, I apologize for the inconvenience. We're offering a special… 
Michael: Special what? Special harassment? I don't need a credit card! I'm perfectly fine with the ones I have. You're pre-approving me for a $2,500 Signature Credit Card at 17.99%? That's a joke! 
Agent: Sir, I understand your frustration. We just want to… 
Michael: No, you don't! You want my money! Just take my number off your list! I'm requesting a do-not-call. 
Agent: Okay, sir. I can certainly do that. I apologize again for… 
Michael: Just do it! *click*

Agent: Hello, Ms. Rodriguez? This is Kevin calling from Finance Solutions. I see you applied for a personal loan online. 
Patricia: Oh, yes, hello. I… um… I'm a little confused about the whole process. 
Agent: No problem at all, Ms. Rodriguez. I'm happy to explain everything. We are pre-approving you for a $2,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 24.99%. 
Patricia: 24.99? Oh my. That's… that's quite high, isn't it? 
Agent: It is a bit higher, yes, due to your credit score. But it's a good option for getting some immediate funds. The monthly payments would be around $75 for 24 months. 
Patricia: Could you… could you repeat that, please? I didn't quite catch the monthly payment. 
Agent: Certainly. $75 a month for 24 months. There's a $100 origination fee. 
Patricia: Hmm. I need to think about it. I need to talk to my daughter. 
Agent: Absolutely. I understand. Would you like me to email you the loan details so you can review them with her? 
Patricia: Yes, that would be very helpful. 
Agent: Great. I'll send that over right away. And feel free to call me back if you have any questions. My number is 555-111-2222.
